race.comment: OUR HUNTRESS (8) returned from an 18-week spell and made it five minor placings from as many career runs when she closed well but found one better over 1100m at Hawkesbury last start. Raced wide without cover that day so although beaten at $1.45 it was a run full of merit. Ready to win with this step-up in distance. MERINI (6) did her best work late to get up for second when resuming over 1100m at Wyong last time out, her first outing since coming to the Lees stable from NZ. Lightly raced filly who will relish getting out to today's journey. Waller first starter CLAUDEL (2) won a recent trial at this track. Has taken a while to get to the races but looks ready to make her mark now. BENEATH THE ROCK (1) made late ground on debut over 1100m at Scone. Will enjoy the extra 200m and in the small field a top three finish is not out of reach. SOLAR DANCE (11) resumes. Filled a placing on debut last prep so she can come to hand quickly.
